shelves.label: Agent Workflows
shelves.purpose: Agent orchestration, setup, delegation, journaling, and project-operation workflows.

shelves.label: Design Foundations
shelves.purpose: Core visual principles, layout fundamentals, responsive practice, loading states, and reference patterns.

shelves.label: Design Color
shelves.purpose: Color spaces, palette work, gradients, gamut, contrast, and tokens.

shelves.label: Design Motion
shelves.purpose: Animation libraries, browser transitions, motion vocabulary, and interface sound.

shelves.label: Design Craft
shelves.purpose: Taste, interaction craft, animation critique, and hands-on UI polish heuristics.

shelves.label: Design Review
shelves.purpose: Static and live UI review, accessibility checks, product UX audits, and annotation workflows.

shelves.label: Design Systems
shelves.purpose: Opt-in reference design systems that should never be auto-applied.

shelves.label: Design Kits
shelves.purpose: Component kits, registries, and opinionated installable UI systems.

shelves.label: Design Tools
shelves.purpose: Installable tools, MCP servers, overlays, packages, and visual helpers.

shelves.label: Engineering
shelves.purpose: Process-discipline skills for planning, building, debugging, cleanup, and agent productivity.

shelves.label: Marketing Skills
shelves.purpose: The upstream Marketing Skills submodule exposed through Cortex.

shelves.label: Local
shelves.purpose: Private client, local-only, or license-restricted skills that sync locally but do not ship publicly.
